message:
feat(core): add circuit breaker bridge methods and recovery choreography (ft-2p9cb.6.2.2)

Bridge methods: total_trips, total_recoveries, total_consecutive_failures,
open/half_open/closed_stages, plan_recovery (pipeline-ordered), initiate_recovery,
availability ratio, record_failures_batch, stage_state accessor, to_invariant_domain.
14 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
